name: Tiramisu (7)
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the egg whites until they are fluffy.
2. Add sugar, along with the cream cheese to the beaten egg whites. Mix all ingredients together.
3. Gradually add the chocolate mix for color.
4. Pour the unsweetened coffee into a bowl and dip the cookies into the coffee.
5. Place the dipped cookies on a platter to form a layer.
6. Spread some cream on top of the cookies.
7. Continue layering until all cream and cookies are used up, finishing with a layer of cream.
8. Refrigerate to cool or eat immediately.
